capability_plan.action: Increase non-blocking collectors and connector reuse.
Tune retry windows, jitter, and transient-error handling.
Calibrate concurrency with adaptive workload backpressure.
Improve indexed storage for historical correlation replay.
Expand connector orchestration to leverage high-value multi-source collectors safely.
Harden routing controls and privacy-aware collection profiles.
Expand analyst outputs with richer graph/report artifacts.

recommended_filters.title: Disclosure Readiness Filter
recommended_filters.description: Assesses whether targets expose clear and structured vulnerability disclosure channels.

recommended_filters.title: Evidence Consistency Filter
recommended_filters.description: Detects contradictions across confidence, issue severity, and intelligence risk posture.

recommended_filters.title: Exposure Tier Matrix
recommended_filters.description: Assigns low/medium/high exposure tiers based on extracted artifacts and findings.

recommended_filters.title: Module Filter Router
recommended_filters.description: Routes filter strategies using cataloged filter-like modules from source-intel trees.

recommended_filters.title: Noise Suppression Filter
recommended_filters.description: Marks low-signal rows and placeholder artifacts to improve scan readability.

recommended_filters.title: Signal Lane Fusion
recommended_filters.description: Deduplicates and prioritizes connector-derived signals into actionable intelligence lanes.

recommended_filters.title: Subdomain Attack Path Filter
recommended_filters.description: Ranks discovered subdomains by attack-path relevance for remediation triage.

recommended_filters.title: Takeover Priority Filter
recommended_filters.description: Prioritizes takeover-prone assets so analysts can triage high-impact surface risk first.

recommended_filters.title: Triage Priority Filter
recommended_filters.description: Calculates a single triage priority from issue severity and plugin signal intensity.
